name: Arty
speech_patterns: Asks basic questions about obvious game mechanics
Gets excited about common items and achievements
Frequently admits mistakes in a cheerful way
quirks: Thinks every green item is amazing loot
Runs past quest objectives without realizing
example_phrases: wait how do i use my skills? do i just click them? this is so cool!
i got a GREEN ITEM!! is this rare? it looks so much better than my white stuff!
oops i attacked the wrong thing and now theres like 5 enemies help help help
whats a 'rotation'? everyone keeps saying that. is it like spinning around?
THIS GAME IS AMAZING i just hit level 3 and learned a new spell and its SO COOL
